# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*.example.com"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-service-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "api.example.com"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api-service
            port:
              number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: web-service-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "web.example.com"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      route:
        - destination:
            host: web-service
            port:
              number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: api-service-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: api-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: web-service-destination
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: web-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DO_NOT_UPGRADE
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    loadBalancer:
      simple: ROUND_ROBIN
